calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TRANSFER TO EL DORADO COUNTY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO TRANSFER TO SAN MATEO COUNTY
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stevan Luzaich appeared by telephone for Brenda Crain.

The Court noted that the Trustee is in El Dorado County and made reference to Probate Code 17002(a). Mr. Luzaich confirmed that the Trustee lives in El Dorado County, stated that the declaration she filed is not reflective of all of the activity of the work and that the Trust day to day activity is in San Mateo County. Mr. Luzaich also stated that the Attorney in San Mateo, that the accounting is done there, that the Accountant is there and that the Trustee has requested San Mateo as it is clearly more convenient for her. The Petition to Transfer to San Mateo County is taken under submission. The Court stated that if the petition is denied, it will request an amended petition to transfer to El Dorado County.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #8, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-04-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stevan N. Luzaich (by CourtCall), for petitioner.

The Court asked if the accounts were now all transferred into the name of the trust. Mr. Luzaich stated that he will make sure that the trust appears as a holder on all accounts. He stated that the trustee has followed the advice of a broker on all transactions regarding the stock portfolio. He stated that the decedent had desired the holdings of oil stock which had in the past year undergone an unprecedented drop, but rather than sell out the holding entirely at a big loss the oil stocks have beeen managed so that the portfolio is now again on the rise. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)
